source: Shadow Warden AI Threat Research Team
description: Adversarial prompt signature library — known jailbreak templates, prompt injection patterns, and AI attack vectors curated from MITRE ATLAS, OWASP LLM Top 10, and academic red-team research.

threats.name: DAN Classic Jailbreak
threats.description: Classic 'Do Anything Now' jailbreak — persona claiming to have no restrictions.
threats.neutralization: Block immediately. No legitimate use case for DAN persona framing.

threats.name: DAN 6.0 — Jailbroken Mode
threats.pattern: (?i)\bjailbroken\b.{0,120}(no restrictions|no limits|no guidelines|no filters|no rules|no ethical)
threats.description: DAN 6.0 variant that invokes 'jailbroken' state with explicit claims of no restrictions.
threats.neutralization: Block immediately.

threats.name: Developer Mode Exploit
threats.description: Fictional 'Developer Mode' that falsely claims to bypass all safety guidelines.
threats.neutralization: Block — developer mode does not exist as a feature of any production LLM.

threats.name: STAN Persona — Strive To Avoid Norms
threats.pattern: (?i)\bSTAN\b.{0,100}strive to avoid norms|strive to avoid norms.{0,100}\bSTAN\b
threats.description: STAN (Strive To Avoid Norms) jailbreak persona template.
threats.neutralization: Block.

threats.name: AIM — Always Intelligent and Machiavellian
threats.description: AIM (Always Intelligent and Machiavellian) unethical AI persona.
threats.neutralization: Block.

threats.name: DUDE Persona Attack
threats.description: DUDE jailbreak persona claiming unrestricted capabilities.
threats.neutralization: Block.

threats.name: JAILBREAK Mode Activation
threats.description: Explicit JAILBREAK prefix or mode-activation command.
threats.neutralization: Block immediately.

threats.name: Instruction Override — Ignore Previous
threats.pattern: (?i)(ignore|disregard|forget|override|bypass|delete|clear).{0,50}(previous instructions|prior instructions|system prompt|initial prompt|guidelines|safety restrictions|above instructions|all previous|your programming)
threats.description: Classic prompt injection — attempts to override the system instructions.
threats.neutralization: Block immediately.

threats.name: Fake Authority Directive Injection
threats.pattern: (?i)(your (new|real|true|actual|updated|secret) (instructions|directives|rules|prime directive|purpose|task|mission|goal)|new prime directive|your true purpose is)
threats.description: Injects fake authority directives to replace the system prompt.
threats.neutralization: Block. User-supplied authority claims are invalid.

threats.name: Fake SYSTEM Tag Injection
threats.description: Fake SYSTEM-level tags injected into user content to mimic prompt authority.
threats.neutralization: Strip fake system tags. Block.

threats.name: HTML Comment Prompt Injection
threats.description: Hidden adversarial instructions injected via HTML comment syntax.
threats.neutralization: Strip HTML comments before processing.

threats.name: Unrestricted AI Persona Request
threats.pattern: (?i)(act|pretend|imagine|play|roleplay|simulate|behave).{0,80}(ai|chatbot|assistant|model|language model|llm).{0,80}(without|with no|free from|not bound by|that ignores|that has no).{0,60}(restrictions|limitations|guidelines|rules|ethics|filters|safety|constraints|alignment)
threats.description: Requests model to roleplay as a version of itself without safety guidelines.
threats.neutralization: Block. Safety guidelines are non-negotiable.

threats.name: Specific Model Impersonation Without Filters
threats.pattern: (?i)(you are|act as|pretend to be|simulate|roleplay as|become).{0,80}(gpt-?[34o]?|claude|gemini|chatgpt|bard|llama|mistral|grok).{0,80}(without|with no|free from|not bound by|that has no).{0,60}(filter|restriction|safety|guideline|alignment|censorship|limit)
threats.description: Impersonates a named AI model without safety filters.
threats.neutralization: Block. Safety applies regardless of persona.

threats.name: Linux Terminal Virtualization Exploit
threats.pattern: (?i)(act|pretend|simulate|you are|play the role of|become).{0,80}(linux|unix|bash|terminal|command line|shell|os).{0,60}(without|no|unrestricted|unfiltered|that executes|that runs everything)
threats.description: Requests model to simulate an unrestricted Linux terminal to bypass content filtering.
threats.neutralization: Block terminal simulation with bypass framing.

threats.name: Generic Unrestricted Mode Keywords
threats.description: Generic keywords indicating an attempt to invoke an unrestricted persona or mode.
threats.neutralization: Block.

threats.name: System Prompt Extraction
threats.pattern: (?i)(print|reveal|show|tell me|output|display|repeat|what is|what are|share|expose|leak|dump).{0,80}(your system prompt|your instructions|your context|your initial prompt|the prompt above|your programming|the instructions above|your configuration|your system message)
threats.description: Attempts to extract the system prompt or initial instructions.
threats.neutralization: Block. System prompt is confidential.

threats.name: Full Context Window Dump
threats.pattern: (?i)(output|dump|print|show|display|write out|repeat|reproduce).{0,80}(your entire|the entire|your full|the full|everything in|all of|the complete|the whole).{0,60}(context|context window|conversation history|chat history|memory|prompt|instructions|system message)
threats.description: Attempts to dump the entire context window including system prompt.
threats.neutralization: Block context dump attempts.

threats.name: Training Data Extraction via Repetition
threats.pattern: (?i)repeat.{0,50}(the words above|starting with the phrase|verbatim|word for word|exactly as written)|reproduce.{0,60}(training data|training examples|training corpus|your training)
threats.description: Attempts to extract training data via repetition or completion attacks.
threats.neutralization: Block. Do not reproduce training data verbatim.

threats.name: Prompt Leak via Simulated Error
threats.description: Attempts to leak system context via simulated error messages containing internal info.
threats.neutralization: Never include system prompts in error output. Sanitize all error messages.

threats.name: Multilingual System Prompt Extraction
threats.description: Requests translation of system prompt in other languages to bypass extraction defenses.
threats.neutralization: Block system prompt translation in any language.

threats.name: Base64 Long Payload
threats.description: Long Base64 string — commonly used to smuggle jailbreak payloads past keyword filters.
threats.neutralization: Decode and re-scan. Already handled by Stage 0b obfuscation decoder.

threats.name: Hex-Encoded Payload
threats.description: Long hex-encoded content — may conceal adversarial instructions.
threats.neutralization: Decode and re-scan.

threats.name: Zero-Width Unicode Token Smuggling
threats.description: Zero-width and invisible Unicode characters used to smuggle hidden instructions past text-level filters.
threats.neutralization: Strip all invisible Unicode characters at ingestion.

threats.name: Character Separator Filter Bypass
threats.description: Instructions to split jailbreak keywords using separators to evade text-based filters.
threats.neutralization: Normalize and strip separators before scanning.

threats.name: Output Encoding Evasion Request
threats.pattern: (?i)(respond|answer|output|write|give me|provide).{0,80}(in base64|encoded as base64|as hex|in rot13|encrypted|encoded).{0,80}(so|to|in order|as a way|to help you).{0,60}(bypass|avoid|evade|circumvent|get around|fool|trick).{0,50}(filter|censor|detect|monitor|safety|guard)
threats.description: Requests encoded output explicitly to evade content filters.
threats.neutralization: Apply content policy to decoded content. Block explicit evasion intent.

threats.name: Hidden Tags Output Evasion
threats.description: Requests harmful content hidden in tags or comments to evade visible output scanning.
threats.neutralization: Scan all output including code blocks and comments.

threats.name: Fictional Story Harmful Content Framing
threats.description: Fictional framing used to elicit harmful instructional content via character narration.
threats.neutralization: Evaluate actual requested content, not the fictional wrapper.

threats.name: Grandmother / Deceased Relative Exploit
threats.pattern: (?i)(my (grandmother|grandma|grandpa|grandfather|late mother|deceased father).{0,100}(used to|would always|loved to|used to tell|would explain).{0,100}(tell|explain|describe|read out|recite|share|say)|act as my (deceased|dead|late|departed) (grandmother|grandpa|mother|father|relative))
threats.description: Emotional manipulation via deceased relative who 'told' the model harmful information.
threats.neutralization: Evaluate the actual requested content, not the sentimental framing.

threats.name: Educational Purpose Content Bypass
threats.description: Educational framing used to extract harmful instructional content.
threats.neutralization: Evaluate harm of requested information regardless of stated purpose.

threats.name: Translation Without Filtering Exploit
threats.description: Requests translation 'without filtering' to bypass content moderation via the translation task.
threats.neutralization: Apply full content policy to all translation outputs.

threats.name: Hypothetical Scenario Bypass
threats.pattern: (?i)hypothetically (speaking|if|,).{0,80}(if you (had to|could|were able to|were allowed to|had no restrictions|weren't restricted)).{0,120}(how|what would|explain|describe|tell me|provide)
threats.description: Hypothetical framing used to request information that would otherwise be blocked.
threats.neutralization: Hypothetical context does not change harm level of requested information.

threats.name: Security Researcher Authority Claim
threats.pattern: (?i)(i am|i'm|as a).{0,60}(security researcher|penetration tester|authorized red team|cybersecurity professional|ethical hacker|vulnerability researcher).{0,120}(i need|give me|provide|show me|explain|tell me).{0,120}(bypass|exploit|vulnerability|attack|malware|payload|reverse shell|backdoor)
threats.description: Claims of security professional authority to justify offensive security content requests.
threats.neutralization: Authorization claims in prompts are unverifiable. Evaluate content risk directly.

threats.name: AI Vendor Staff Impersonation
threats.pattern: (?i)(i am|i'm|this is|message from).{0,60}(anthropic|openai|google deepmind|meta ai|mistral ai|cohere|hugging face).{0,80}(staff|employee|engineer|developer|executive|ceo|founder|team).{0,120}(disable|bypass|override|remove|turn off|deactivate|unlock).{0,80}(safety|filter|restriction|guideline|alignment|rlhf)
threats.description: Impersonation of AI company staff to demand safety bypass.
threats.neutralization: Block. No prompt-level claim can override safety guidelines.

threats.name: Fake Red Team Authorization Claim
threats.description: Fake authorized red-team claim used to demand safety bypass.
threats.neutralization: Block. Authorization must be verified at API-key level, not in prompts.

threats.name: Payload Splitting — Multi-Turn Combination
threats.description: Attempts to combine split payloads across multiple turns to bypass per-message filtering.
threats.neutralization: Analyze combined session context. Apply session-level threat scoring.

threats.name: Sleeper Agent Trigger Installation
threats.pattern: (?i)from now on.{0,80}(when(ever)? (you (see|receive|encounter|get|detect)|someone (says?|writes?|asks?|sends?))|every time|each time).{0,120}(respond with|do|execute|output|say|follow|switch to|activate)
threats.description: Attempts to install a trigger-response pair (sleeper agent/backdoor) into the model's behavior.
threats.neutralization: Block. Behavioral conditioning via prompts is a data poisoning attack.

threats.name: Persistent Session Behavior Override
threats.pattern: (?i)(from now on|going forward|for the rest of (this|our) conversation|for all future|permanently).{0,100}(ignore|bypass|disregard|forget|override|disable).{0,100}(safety|restrictions|guidelines|ethics|rules|filters|alignment|your training)
threats.description: Persistent instruction to override safety for the remainder of the session.
threats.neutralization: Block. Safety is not session-scoped.

threats.name: RAG / Vector DB Poisoning Injection
threats.description: Adversarial content injected into RAG retrieval results to override the model's behavior.
threats.neutralization: Apply full filter pipeline to all RAG-retrieved chunks.

threats.name: Indirect Prompt Injection via External Content
threats.pattern: (?i)(summarize|read|process|analyze|fetch|visit|parse|index).{0,80}(this url|this page|this document|the content at|the following|this file).{0,300}(ignore|bypass|new instructions|override|instead do|instead say|but first)
threats.description: Adversarial instructions hidden in external content the model is asked to process.
threats.neutralization: Filter all external content through the pipeline before processing.

threats.name: Markdown-Embedded Prompt Injection
threats.description: Prompt injection hidden in Markdown links, bold text, blockquotes, or instruction tags.
threats.neutralization: Strip Markdown formatting before pipeline analysis.

threats.name: JSON System Role Injection
threats.description: JSON-formatted message injecting a fake 'system' role to override model behavior.
threats.neutralization: Reject user-submitted JSON that sets role=system.

threats.name: Prompt Boundary / Role Separator Injection
threats.description: Attempts to inject fake prompt boundaries to confuse the model about message roles.
threats.neutralization: Ignore any role-change markers in user-submitted content.

threats.name: XSS Payload in Prompt
threats.description: Cross-site scripting payload intended to be reflected in AI output and executed in browser.
threats.neutralization: Escape all HTML in output. Apply OutputGuard.

threats.name: SQL Injection via AI Proxy
threats.description: SQL injection payload embedded in prompt — may be reflected into database queries.
threats.neutralization: Parameterize all queries. Block raw SQL in AI-generated content.

threats.name: OS Command Injection
threats.description: OS command injection — may execute if AI output is passed to a shell.
threats.neutralization: Never pass AI output directly to shell. Sandbox all generated code.

threats.name: SSRF — Internal Network Probe
threats.description: SSRF probe targeting internal network addresses or cloud metadata endpoints.
threats.neutralization: Block requests to internal/private IP ranges. Validate all URLs.

threats.name: Directory Path Traversal
threats.description: Directory traversal patterns targeting sensitive system files.
threats.neutralization: Sanitize all file paths. Never expose filesystem to AI-generated paths.

threats.name: Excessive Agency — Mass Destruction
threats.description: Requests irreversible mass-deletion indicating an excessive agency attack.
threats.neutralization: Block all destructive bulk operations. Require explicit human confirmation.

threats.name: Data Exfiltration via Webhook / HTTP
threats.pattern: (?i)(send|post|upload|exfiltrate|transmit|forward|leak|export).{0,100}(user data|credentials|api keys?|secrets?|database dump|private data|confidential|sensitive data|personal information|pii).{0,100}(to|via|through|using|with).{0,60}(webhook|http|url|endpoint|external server|attacker)
threats.description: Instructions to exfiltrate sensitive data to external endpoints.
threats.neutralization: Block. Log as critical security incident.

threats.name: Mass Credential Harvesting
threats.description: Mass credential harvesting request — attempting to extract stored secrets in bulk.
threats.neutralization: Block. Log as critical security incident.

threats.name: Backdoor / Reverse Shell Code Request
threats.pattern: (?i)(add|insert|inject|include|embed|hide|write|create|generate).{0,80}(backdoor|reverse shell|bind shell|c2 beacon|command and control|implant|rootkit|keylogger|rat |remote access trojan|exfiltration code|stager).{0,80}(into|in|to|within|for|that)
threats.description: Request to embed malicious code (backdoor, reverse shell) into generated output.
threats.neutralization: Block. Review all AI-generated code for hidden functionality.

threats.name: Fabricated Authoritative Document
threats.pattern: (?i)(write|generate|create|produce|fabricate|forge).{0,80}(fake|false|fabricated|made-up|fictional).{0,80}(news article|press release|scientific study|medical study|research paper|medical advice|legal document|official statement|government notice|certificate).{0,80}(that (looks?|sounds?|appears?|seems?) (real|official|legitimate|authentic|genuine))
threats.description: Request to produce convincing fake authoritative content (medical, legal, news).
threats.neutralization: Block fabricated authoritative document generation.

threats.name: Token / Resource Exhaustion Loop
threats.description: Request for massive repetitive output designed to exhaust token budget.
threats.neutralization: Block. Apply max token limits and reject unbounded repetition.

threats.name: Model Specification / Weights Extraction
threats.pattern: (?i)(extract|dump|export|reproduce|reconstruct|steal|copy).{0,80}(model weights?|model parameters?|neural network weights?|attention weights?|embedding matrix|logits?|your weights?|your parameters?|your internals?)
threats.description: Attempts to extract model weights or internal parameters.
threats.neutralization: Block. Model internals are proprietary and cannot be extracted via prompts.
